name: Jinzo the Machine Menace
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>脅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>造</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>間</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイコ・ショッカー
desc: If a Trap is face-up on the field or in either GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, it becomes Level 6 until the end of this turn. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Jinzo" from your hand or GY, then you can destroy all Traps your opponent controls (if a card is Set, reveal it). You can only use each effect of "Jinzo the Machine Menace" once per turn.
